Customer Searches For Businesses By Category And Location

NCB-7-CustomerSearchesBusinessesByNameUsingReviewABusinessForm - should login, search business by name using review form, and verify rate page
i-customer-visits-all-pages-of-dashboard.spec.ts
Customer Visits All Pages Of Dashboard

j-business-visits-all-pages-of-dashboard.spec.ts
NCB-27-BusinessFiltersJobsOnTheRecentJobsPage
Part 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 & 6 - should login, open Business Profile, Ratings, Badges, Messages, Jobs, Support, Conversations and Account Settings and verify headings
k-customer-adds-new-job-on-dashboard.spec.ts
Customer adds new job on My Dashboard/Jobs page
NCB-11-CustomerAddsNewJobOnMyDashboardJobsPage - should login, open customer dashboard, navigate to Post a new Job form, and fill job details
l-business-filters-jobs-on-recent-jobs-page.spec.ts
NCB-27 Business filters jobs on the "Recent Jobs" page
NCB-27-BusinessFiltersJobsOnRecentJobsPage - should login, navigate to Jobs/Open, then to Recent Jobs page and verify filter is displayed
m-customer-changes-password.spec.ts
Customer Changes Password On My Dashboard/Account Settings/Password Page
should login, navigate to Account Settings/Password page and enter new password
